channel.title: Production on StageSet Controller
channel.description: Recent content in Production on StageSet Controller

item.title: Production
item.description: The chart’s defaults bring up a hardened, lease-guarded controller, but a few decisions still belong to you before it manages production releases: whether rollback is enabled and where its store lives, how many replicas run, what the controller can reach, and how you observe and recover it. Work through these in order. Each step states what to set and why, and ends with the Helm values for that step. Every flag and its Helm value live in the configuration reference .

item.title: Run in production
item.description:
Once the controller is installed, these pages cover keeping it healthy in production: the posture to set before going live, what to watch day to day, how to size it, and how to recover its state.

  • Production — HA replicas, leader election, webhook TLS, and the security posture to set before going live.
  • Operations — day-two running: what to watch, drift correction, and routine tasks.
  • Scale and capacity — sizing, throughput, and resource tuning for larger fleets.
  • Backup and disaster recovery — what to back up and how to recover the controller’s state.
